title: Behavior & motion
description: Conditional card. The multi-domain guideline doc carries no per-component motion (domains.behavior is status-only), so motion resolves from the component's category-defaults: when categoryDefaults.motion has a patternRefs[0], the card renders that pattern; otherwise it is skipped. Phase rows come from vendor/foundations/dist/tokens/motion.json#patterns.<slug>.

sections.patternSlug: Slug of the motion pattern referenced from foundations.md (e.g. 'drawer', 'layered-overlays', 'success-toast'). Must exist in tokens/motion.json#patterns.
sections.patternName: Human-readable pattern name copied from tokens/motion.json (e.g. 'Drawer (open/close)'). Used as a card subtitle.
sections.phases: Array of phase rows pulled verbatim from tokens/motion.json#patterns.<slug>.phases. Columns vary by pattern (Phase / Duration / Easing / Behavior, or pattern-specific shapes).
sections.logic_and_accessibility: Optional — array of strings copied from tokens/motion.json#patterns.<slug>.logic_and_accessibility. Per-pattern accessibility/intent notes (e.g. 'Reduced motion: disable fades').
sections.notes: Optional — array of strings copied from tokens/motion.json#patterns.<slug>.notes. Pattern-level notes (cascading effects, hold timing, etc).
sections.overrides: Optional free-text. Reserved for component-specific deviations from the canonical pattern; the category-default motion path leaves this null.

qualityRules: Phases must come verbatim from tokens/motion.json — never invent durations or easings
When neither the component's category-defaults nor any source declares a motion pattern, suppress the card entirely (do not emit empty motion)
patternSlug must match a key in tokens/motion.json#patterns; fail loudly if not
